creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 145931
Patch to the ports tree

Update graphics/converseen to 0.8.1. This is a minor update.

Note: Unlike other times, I don't provide redports file log since there seems to be a problem and many ports show "finished" build status. See:

https://www.mail-archive.com/freebsd-ports@freebsd.org/msg60366.html
